top_weaknesses.issue: Mid-essay shifts from concrete consumer reality to analyst-note cadence (Mastercard 3.4%, ServiceNow 23->14%, DCF terminal margins, Yale/Sonnenfeld) — feels bolted on and pings the AI-slop sensor for ICP readers.
top_weaknesses.fix: Cut at least two of the borrowed scenario stats; replace with one falsifiable mechanism the author can defend (e.g. why MLS access or RESPA is or isn't a blocker).

top_weaknesses.issue: Four paragraphs run >80 words on mobile (94, 85, 97, 115) — the capital-flow section is the densest and lacks H3s or lists.
top_weaknesses.fix: Break the 115-word McKinsey paragraph at 'But the $30,000 used to flow through...'; add 2-3 H3s under the capital-flow H2 ('Toll roads', 'DCF reset', 'Local demand shock').

top_weaknesses.issue: The 'four things' enumeration in the disintermediation section is buried in a 71-word run-on sentence instead of a numbered list.
top_weaknesses.fix: Convert 'searches across multiple databases simultaneously / fills in forms / negotiates / signs' into a 1-2-3-4 list.

top_weaknesses.issue: Final H2 'The honest question' is placeholder-ish; the title 'Friction Was the Business Model' is punchy but doesn't name the domain.
top_weaknesses.fix: Sharpen final H2 to e.g. 'What replaces the friction layer'; consider title appendix like 'Friction Was the Business Model: Why Brokers, Couriers, and SaaS Marketplaces All Re-Rate Together'.

top_weaknesses.issue: Asserts 2027 agent capability (negotiate within bounds, sign on your behalf, every transaction in parallel) without naming the real blockers (liability, compliance, MLS access, agency law).
top_weaknesses.fix: Add one sentence acknowledging the constraint and one concrete leading indicator.

consensus_summary: All personas agree the spine and opening are strong (5-6% to <1% is a sticky compression number) but mid-essay structure leaks: too many >80-word paragraphs, the 'four things' wants to be a list, and the capital-flow section needs H3s. ICP holds out at 5 because the borrowed Citrini stats and unhedged 2027 claims feel like macro-thesis cosplay rather than an earned take.
